title: Incredibly Mechanised
description: A carefully crafted Forge 1.20.1 modpack with 100+ mods that add new mechanisms and contraptions.
body:
# **Banner**
![Incredibly Mechanised Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/641468e1d7d00efaecec3ce5397519887db2f833.png)

**Loader**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Mechanised** modpack is supported by the **Forge** mod loader.
> To get the **Incredibly Modified** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-modified).

> To get the **Incredibly Scary** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-scary).

**Mods**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Mechanised** modpack contains **100+ mods** that add multiple new mechanisms and contraptions designed for redstone engineers.

**Features**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Incredibly Mechanised** modpack offers:

✔️ Enhanced Exploration

✔️ Shader support

✔️ New dimensions

✔️ New blocks

✔️ New mechanics

✔️ New structures

✔️ New biomes

✔️ New mobs

✔️ New mechanisms

✔️ New redstone components

✔️ New machinery

✔️ & much more!

**Installation**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
> Download a Minecraft launcher of your choice ([AT Launcher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads), [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/), [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app))

> Login to the laucher

> Search for the **Incredibly Mechanised** modpack

> Click install

> Choose the newest version

> You have succesfully installed it!
